name: Taco Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the purple Spanish onion and lightly grease a 13-inch quiche dish (or one 13 x 9-inch pan or two 9-inch pie pans).
2. Brown the ground beef and onion in the greased dish.
3. Pour off any excess drippings.
4. Add garlic, chili powder, oregano, cumin, thyme, and salt to the mixture. Stir to combine.
5. Spoon the beef mixture into the prepared dish.
6. Top with cheese.
7. Beat eggs and milk together and pour over the filling in the dish.
8. Bake in a moderate oven (350 degrees F) for 1 hour or until set.
9. Spread sour cream on top of the quiche.
10. Top with sliced avocado, lettuce, and olives.
11. Garnish as desired.
12. Cut into serving pieces and serve with salsa.
